{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Tanakites
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tanakites]] are a group that has recently fought a war.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tanakites]] have a high level of confidence.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
